prompt: A photorealistic, casual smartphone photo of a young woman with {argument name="hair style and color" default="long blonde balayage hair"} sitting at a table in a {argument name="setting" default="wine bar"}. She is wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="dark brown leather blazer"}. She is resting her chin on her right hand, which has a simple gold ring, and making a {argument name="expression" default="playful pursed-lip expression while looking off to the side"}. In the foreground on the white tablecloth, there is a water glass and a {argument name="drink" default="large wine glass containing red wine"}. The background features brightly illuminated modern shelving fully stocked with various wine bottles. Warm, inviting indoor lighting.
translatedPrompt: 一张写实风格的休闲手机摄影照片，展示了一位留着 {argument name="hair style and color" default="金色挑染长发"} 的年轻女性，正坐在 {argument name="setting" default="葡萄酒吧"} 的桌前。她身穿一件 {argument name="outfit" default="深棕色皮质西装外套"}。她用右手托着下巴，手上戴着一枚简约的金戒指，并做出一个 {argument name="expression" default="俏皮地嘟起嘴看向一侧"} 的表情。前景的白色桌布上放着一个水杯和一杯 {argument name="drink" default="盛有红酒的大号高脚杯"}。背景是灯光璀璨的现代货架，上面摆满了各种葡萄酒。室内光线温暖宜人。

breakdown.creativeCore: 休闲酒吧人像：生成一张写实风格的抓拍人像，展示一个人坐在餐厅桌前，桌上有饮品，背景为灯光照亮的货架。
breakdown.subject: 产品
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
